title: How to get a police certificate - Jordan - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate - Jordan
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.
Do I need to provide a police certificate when applying for permanent residence? Yes.
Name of document(s) to get : Jordan has two different types of police certificates, the Good Conduct certificate and the Non-conviction certificate . Both certificates are required.

## How to get a Police Certificate:

### If you are a citizen of Jordan:

#### If you live in Jordan:
The Good Conduct certificate can be obtained at the General Intelligence Department. There are offices located in cities across Jordan.
The Non-conviction certificate can be obtained at the Courts of First Instance. There are offices located in cities across Jordan.

#### If you live outside of Jordan:
You can apply for the Good Conduct certificate and the Non-conviction certificate through any Jordanian embassy abroad. See Information and documents you need for a list of required documents.

### If you are not a citizen of Jordan:

#### If you live in Jordan:
The Good Conduct certificate can be obtained at the General Intelligence Department. There are offices located in cities across Jordan.
The Non-conviction certificate can be obtained at the Courts of First Instance.  There are offices located in cities across Jordan.

#### If you live outside of Jordan:
You can apply for the Good Conduct certificate and the Non-conviction certificate through any Jordanian embassy abroad. See Information and documents you need for a list of required documents.

## Information and documents you need:
To get a Good Conduct certificate , you will need to provide:
- A police certificate form for travel abroad,
- two passport photographs (6cm x 4cm),
- a copy of your passport, and
To get a Non-conviction certificate , you will need to provide:
- A non-conviction form,
- a valid identification document or passport,
- application fees, and

## Special notes and considerations

### General Intelligence Department
Telephone: + 962 6 586 5131
Visit the GID website for more information on the Good Conduct certificate.

### First Instance Court
Telephone: + 962 6 562 3320
Visit the Judicial Council website for more information on the Non-conviction certificate (available in Arabic only).
